@101 [Eb]
  tk1 : G4+Bb4+C5+Eb5@1>8^80 G4+Bb4+Eb5@9>8^80 C5@10>4^80 F4+Ab4+Bb4+Db5@17>7^80 G4+Bb4+C5+Eb5@25>6^80
